campus: San Pietro in Vincoli / Città Universitaria, Rome (Department of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering - DIMA)
faculty: Civil and Industrial Engineering (ICI); Department of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering (DIMA)
movein_preselection_required: [uncertain] Yes for non-EU applicants residing abroad (standard Sapienza route via MoveIN); not stated on the programme's own pages
admission_test_type: No entrance exam. Admission by verification of curricular requirements and adequacy of personal preparation; English B2 is a separate mandatory requirement that may be certified or tested during the first year
application_platform: Infostud (Sapienza student portal); MoveIN platform for international/non-EU applicants residing abroad; Universitaly for non-EU visa pre-enrolment
access_quota_non_eu: [uncertain] Per-programme non-EU quota not extracted from the 2026-2027 Call PDF
application_round: September intake (single annual intake); enrolment procedure (requirement verification then matriculation) generally opens in July
intake_semester_availability: [uncertain] September intake; February intake not confirmed
places_and_foreign_contingent: [uncertain] Total places and non-EU contingent not extracted from the 2026-2027 Call PDF

academic_requirements.summary: Laurea Magistrale admission is a two-phase procedure: (1) verification of access requirements (results communicated to the applicant by email to the Infostud address), then (2) matriculation. Applicants should self-assess against the programme Academic Regulations (Regolamento didattico, Sezione II - Norme generali - Requisiti di ammissione) by comparing their first-level degree curriculum with the listed access requirements.
academic_requirements.curricular_requirements: [uncertain] Specific curricular ECTS thresholds (typical LM-20 mathematics/physics/aerospace areas) are defined in the programme Academic Regulations; not extracted verbatim

country_specific_eligibility: Foreign qualifications assessed per Sapienza 'Accepted qualifications by Country' 2026/2027 document and MoveIN academic requirements. See https://www.uniroma1.it/en/admissions
curricular_integration_policy: [uncertain] Curricular gap/integration rules governed by the programme Academic Regulations; not extracted verbatim

language_requirements.level: B2 CEFR English (mandatory for admission to the programme since a.y. 2022-2023)
language_requirements.certificates: A B2-level (or equivalent) English certificate; if not held at matriculation, the level can be verified during the first year via courses/test run by the Faculty of Civil and Industrial Engineering (ICI) English language readers
language_requirements.note: Programme is taught entirely in English. B2 requirement is explicitly applied only to Space and Astronautical Engineering among the LM-20 aerospace masters.

language_submission_timing: Certificate may be uploaded at matriculation or obtained/verified during the first year of enrolment (B2 test with ICI Faculty English readers if no certificate)
italian_language_requirement: Not required for admission (programme fully in English)
application_deadline_eu: July 31, 2026 (EU and EU-equivalent candidates not requiring a visa), via MoveIN pre-selection then Infostud enrolment
application_deadline_non_eu: May 15, 2026 (non-EU candidates residing abroad and requiring a visa) for MoveIN pre-selection; pre-accepted students must register on Universitaly by June 30, 2026
application_fee: €30 per application (maximum 2 applications per candidate per academic year; no waiver)
visa_preenrolment_deadline: June 30, 2026 (Universitaly pre-enrolment for non-EU visa applicants)
document_translation_authentication: Foreign documents require validation per Sapienza International Student Office rules (Declaration of Value / CIMEA statement / legalization-apostille as applicable). See https://www.uniroma1.it/en/pagina/international-student-office
entry_exam_or_test: No entrance test. Access procedure: 'Verification of requirements and personal preparation' (two phases: requirement verification, then matriculation). Separately, a mandatory English B2 requirement must be certified or passed via an ICI Faculty test within the first year.
test_variant_and_session: English B2 verification test offered by the ICI Faculty English language readers for students without a B2 certificate (within the first year of enrolment)
test_score_conversion_or_threshold: English language threshold: B2 CEFR or equivalent

source_quotes.quote: Programme code 33484 / Test code 33484 / Bachelor class LM-20 / Duration 2 years / Access procedure Verification of requirements and personal preparation / Faculty Ingegneria civile e industriale / Department INGEGNERIA MECCANICA E AEROSPAZIALE / Language English

La procedura prevede 2 fasi: verifica dei requisiti (i cui esiti vengono comunicati allo studente per e-mail, all'indirizzo dichiarato su Infostud); immatricolazione ... consultare i relativi Regolamenti didattici: in particolare nella Sezione II - Norme generali - Requisiti di ammissione.

Solo per i studenti di Space and Astronautical Engineering è richiesta la verifica del requisito della conoscenza della lingua inglese livello B2 ... a partire dall'a.a. 2022-2023, ai fini dell'ammissione è richiesta una certificazione di livello B2 o equivalente ... Qualora la certificazione non fosse posseduta dallo studente all'atto dell'immatricolazione, il livello potrà essere verificato corso del primo anno attraverso corsi erogati dalla Facoltà di Ingegneria Civile e Industriale.

the deadline for Non-EU candidates (visa applicants) expired on May 15, 2026 ... open until July 31, 2026, exclusively for EU and EU-equivalent candidates ... register on the Universitaly platform by June 30th, 2026.
All pre-selection candidates are required to pay a €30 application fee for each submitted application (up to a maximum of two applications per candidate per intake).

uncertainty_notes: The dedicated site http://www.aeroeng.uniroma1.it/ redirects to the ICI Faculty home (https://ici.web.uniroma1.it/); programme-specific admission detail was instead taken from the aerospace CAD Google Site (iscrizioni lauree magistrali) and the official catalogue.
Catalogue language field rendered as 'English, English'; treated as fully English (consistent with B2 English admission requirement).
Specific curricular ECTS thresholds for LM-20 admission are in the programme Academic Regulations, not extracted verbatim.
MoveIN pre-selection requirement is the standard Sapienza non-EU route but is not stated on the programme's own pages.
Per-programme non-EU quota and total places not extracted from the 2026-2027 Call PDF.
Deadlines and fee taken from the central 2026-2027 International Admissions page (authoritative); February intake not confirmed.
